overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval harbor at dusk. The character exits a dark ship cabin, walks across the deck and along wooden docks past various NPCs, eventually entering the shallow water to view a dramatic sunset over the harbor with silhouetted sailing vessels.

events.description: approaching doorway with bright exterior light streaming in
exits ship cabin onto exterior deck

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit wooden cabin toward the bright exit doorway

entered.detail: dark wooden plank walls of the ship interior
small barred window letting in dim exterior light
open doorway leading to bright exterior deck

segments.scene_description: Inside a dark wooden ship cabin, Geralt walks toward the exit as exterior light gradually fills the doorway. The space is narrow and enclosed with wooden walls and a small window, creating a contrast between the dim interior and the bright world outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden ship deck with mast and steering wheel

events.description: ascends stairs to upper deck level near the ship wheel
descends from ship deck down to dock level

agents.ego_description: walking around the ship deck examining the surroundings and heading toward the dock

notable_agents.action: shirtless sailor standing near the ship railing looking out at the harbor

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the ship deck
tall wooden mast with rigging lines

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the ship deck, the scene opens to a cloudy dusk sky. Geralt walks across the wooden deck, passing a sailor and approaching the ship's wheel before descending toward the dock. The harbor buildings are visible in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor dock with timber warehouses and cranes

events.description: passes group of guards in red armor carrying lit torches
steps off wooden dock into shallow water

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock past workers and guards, heading toward the water's edge

notable_agents.action: shirtless dock worker with back tattoos walking alongside the player
group of guards in red armor carrying lit torches marching in formation

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the harbor pier
medieval half-timbered warehouse with white plaster and dark beams
large wooden water wheel mechanism attached to building
wooden crane structure for loading cargo onto ships

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wooden dock, Geralt passes medieval timber-framed warehouses and a large water wheel. The dock is moderately busy with workers and a formation of torch-bearing guards. The character continues past harbor cranes toward the water's edge where wooden planks meet the sea.

events.description: enters shallow water from wooden dock
sunset becomes fully visible with orange sky reflecting on water surface

agents.ego_description: walking into shallow water and stopping to look at the sunset over the harbor

entered.detail: calm reflective water surface at the harbor edge
dramatic orange and gold sunset sky with scattered clouds
tall sailing ships with full sails silhouetted against the sunset

segments.scene_description: Stepping off the dock into shallow water, Geralt stands surrounded by calm reflective water as the scene opens to a breathtaking sunset view. Sailing vessels are silhouetted against the orange sky, and the city skyline stretches across the horizon while birds fly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a ship into a vast, open harbor landscape at sunset. It begins inside a dim, narrow wooden cabin, moving toward a doorway where exterior light gradually floods the enclosed space. As the camera emerges onto the ship's deck under a cloudy dusk sky, it follows the character past a sailor and the ship's wheel before descending toward the shore. The scene then expands along a bustling wooden dock, passing timber-framed warehouses, a large water wheel, and torch-bearing guards before reaching the water's edge. Finally, the camera steps into the shallow, reflective sea, opening up to a breathtaking view of silhouetted sailing vessels and a city skyline set against a vibrant orange sunset.
